vocab.meaning: giao dịch mượt mà, không gặp trở ngại
vocab.example: I gravitate towards online banking because it facilitates seamless transactions without the need for physical contact.

vocab.meaning: sự tiện lợi vô song/vượt trội
vocab.example: Mobile banking apps offer unparalleled convenience, allowing me to settle bills at the touch of a button.

vocab.meaning: một xã hội không dùng tiền mặt
vocab.example: As we transition into a cashless society, carrying a bulky wallet full of notes is becoming increasingly obsolete.
Using digital services makes it significantly easier to track my expenditure through automated monthly statements.

vocab.meaning: thanh toán không tiếp xúc (chạm thẻ/điện thoại)
vocab.example: The rise of contactless payment has drastically sped up the queuing process at grocery stores and cafes.

vocab.meaning: sự minh bạch về tài chính
vocab.example: I value the financial transparency that bank services provide, as every single cent is accounted for in my digital ledger.

vocab.meaning: những tình huống không lường trước được
vocab.example: I usually keep a small amount of cash on hand just in case of unforeseen circumstances like a system outage.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy kỷ luật tài chính
vocab.example: Some argue that using physical cash helps foster financial discipline because you can literally see the money leaving your hand.

vocab.meaning: các cửa hàng truyền thống (có mặt bằng vật lý)
vocab.example: While digital payments are dominant, certain small brick-and-mortar stores in rural areas still operate on a cash-only basis.

vocab.meaning: dễ bị tấn công bởi các mối đe dọa mạng
vocab.example: One downside of online banking is that your accounts may be vulnerable to cyber threats if you don't use strong security measures.
